user_task_description: This vendor packet needs a concise extracted summary panel on the cover page.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Fill the cover `Key Facts` panel with vendor name, quote reference, total including options, and delivery window extracted from the detailed quote page.
atomic_scope: Only the four extracted fields inserted into the cover summary panel are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf packet with a populated cover `Key Facts` panel.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Do not modify the detailed quote text
- Keep the summary panel compact
